name: Universal Messenger Bot API
description: Sends messages to various chat services (WeChat Work, Discord, Slack) using official Webhooks or Bot APIs. This is high-reliability, silent communication that works directly via HTTP and does not require GUI interaction.

webhook_url.description: The target API/Webhook URL provided by the messenger service.

message.description: The text message content to send.

bot_type.description: Type of bot to auto-format the JSON payload.

chat_id.description: Required for Telegram: The unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target channel (in the format @channelusername).

custom_payload.description: Optional: If provided, this will be the exact JSON body sent, ignoring 'message' and 'bot_type'.
